mundo.titulo: Murdered student told police 'I can't breathe' while handcuffed
mundo.resumen: An independent investigation into why Henry Nowak was handcuffed by police as he was dying is ongoing.

mundo.titulo: Murrell used SNP cards for £400,000 spending spree
mundo.resumen: The former SNP chief executive is facing a lengthy jail sentence after admitting embezzling funds from the party.

mundo.titulo: Five questions left unanswered by the Mandelson files
mundo.resumen: A second batch of files relating to Lord Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador has been released.

mundo.titulo: UK Athletics fined £350,000 over death of Paralympian
mundo.resumen: A judge at the Old Bailey has fined UK Athletics £350,000 with £44,000 in costs after hearing how a Paralympic athlete died when equipment fell on him at a training ground in east London.

mundo.titulo: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 21 people
mundo.resumen: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.

mundo.titulo: Scotland legend Sir Kenny Dalglish undergoing treatment for cancer
mundo.resumen: Scotland, Liverpool and Celtic great Sir Kenny Dalglish confirms he is undergoing treatment for cancer.

negocios.titulo: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
negocios.resumen: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.

negocios.titulo: Third of people say uni degree not worth it, as student loan inquiry begins
negocios.resumen: MPs will hear the concerns of graduates about the size of their student debts, and the interest rates.

negocios.titulo: AI giant Anthropic plans to sell shares in US as valuation nears $1tn
negocios.resumen: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public the chance to buy and sell shares in the firm later this year.

negocios.titulo: Post Office scandal victim dedicates OBE to 'sub-postmasters we have lost'
negocios.resumen: The 92-year-old said she dedicate the OBE to 'all sub-postmasters we have lost'.

negocios.titulo: Steph Curry signs with Chinese brand after Under Armour split
negocios.resumen: Chinese firms have been vying to secure deals with big stars as they push to become global brands.

negocios.titulo: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
negocios.resumen: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.

tecnologia.titulo: X caters to creators with new ‘React with Video’ feature
tecnologia.resumen: X will now let you 'react with video' to posts.

tecnologia.titulo: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos  to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
tecnologia.resumen: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries — targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare, and communications where a cyberattack could affect 100 million people.

tecnologia.titulo: Apple’s MacBook Neo is winning over a new generation of buyers
tecnologia.resumen: The MacBook Neo shipped 1.1 million units in its first weeks on sale, IDC estimates, as Apple pushes deeper into the mainstream laptop market.

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon Prime Day 2026 takes place June 23-26
tecnologia.resumen: Groceries and household essentials will be a main focus of this year's deals event.

tecnologia.titulo: Blue Origin plans to launch New Glenn again this year after explosion
tecnologia.resumen: CEO Dave Limp said damage to the company's launchpad in Florida was not as bad as expected. But Blue Origin still hasn't shared the cause of last week's explosion.

tecnologia.titulo: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
tecnologia.resumen: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

tecnologia.titulo: Lego’s Smart Play Pokémon can train and battle, but don’t do the one thing I wish they could
tecnologia.resumen: When Lego announced its tech-packed Smart Bricks at CES, we were impressed by the potential - enough to give it our Best in Show award. tecnologia.titulo: Thermacell’s latest smart mosquito system is bigger and more expensive
tecnologia.resumen: Thermacell has launched Liv 2.0, the next generation of its Wi-Fi-connected smart mosquito protection system. It features new hardware and can cover a larger area, and Thermacell says its formula can now deter no-see-ums. But it's also more expensive and requires professional installation. Liv 2.0 uses the same setup as the original Liv - a […]

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon’s four-day Prime Day begins on June 23rd
tecnologia.resumen: Amazon bucked its usual tradition of having Prime Day in July. Prime Day 2026 is happening in June, kicking off in just a few weeks. Prime members will get access to many deals starting June 23rd at 3:01AM ET through June 27th at 3:01AM ET. As with Amazon’s previous events, you don’t need to be […]

tecnologia.titulo: Gemini Spark is the most impressive and terrifying AI experience I’ve had yet
tecnologia.resumen: According to every product demo from the last four years, planning a trip is a killer use case for AI. tecnologia.titulo: People are leaving a lot of weird stuff in their robotaxis
tecnologia.resumen: A unicorn Beanie Baby. A 15-pound green bowling ball. A pair of dentures. These are just some of the items left behind in robotaxis in the past year, according to Uber's annual Lost and Found Index. tecnologia.titulo: How to watch Microsoft’s Build 2026 conference
tecnologia.resumen: Microsoft is kicking off its yearly Build developer conference in San Francisco today, sandwiched between the recent Google I/O and Apple's upcoming WWDC event.
